mapper.select: select * from users where company_id = #{companyId} order by full_name nulls last, created_at desc
select * from users where email = #{email} limit 1
select * from users where lower(email) = lower(#{email}) limit 1
select count(1) from users where email is not null and lower(email) = lower(#{email})
SELECT manager_user_id FROM employee_profiles WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT u.user_id FROM users u JOIN user_roles ur ON ur.user_id = u.user_id JOIN roles r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE u.company_id = #{companyId} AND u.status = 'ACTIVE' AND upper(r.code) IN ('HR', 'HR_ADMIN') AND upper(r.status) = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT DISTINCT u.user_id FROM users u JOIN user_roles ur ON ur.user_id = u.user_id WHERE upper(coalesce(u.status, '')) = 'ACTIVE' AND ur.role_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002'

SELECT u.user_id FROM users u JOIN user_roles ur ON ur.user_id = u.user_id WHERE upper(coalesce(u.status, '')) = 'ACTIVE' AND ur.role_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002' ORDER BY u.created_at LIMIT 1
